title: compat api: Networks must be empty instead of null
body:
The compat endpoint for container inspect must return {} instead of null
for NetworkSettings.Networks.

Fixes #9837

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *Luap99* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [Luap99] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Wouldn't it be better to return the actual networks information instead of stubbing it out to be empty?
That's already done above, by the JSON marshal/unmarshal.
As far as I can tell, `NetworkSettings.Networks` is always empty (`{}`), which ended up being the root cause of an issue I just reported: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/10261
